# Problem Solving Mind (PSM)

Problem Solving Mind (PSM) is an innovation-driven technology ecosystem focused on solving real-world challenges through software, artificial intelligence, education, and creativity.

Founded by Prasanna Venkatesan and Maniyarasan, PSM operates through three specialized divisions:

1. PSM Solutions – Product & Technology Company
2. PSM Lab – Learning & Innovation Platform
3. PSM Edits – Creative Media & Branding Studio

Mission:
"Solving Problems. Building Solutions. Creating Impact."

Website:
https://www.problemsolvingmind.com

Country:
India

Status:
Active

--------------------------------------------------
COMPANY OVERVIEW
--------------------------------------------------

PSM is a technology-first ecosystem that develops digital products, intelligent software solutions, educational initiatives, and creative services.

The ecosystem combines innovation, engineering, learning, and design to create meaningful impact for businesses and individuals.

Core Focus Areas:

- Software Development
- Artificial Intelligence
- Web Applications
- Mobile Applications
- SaaS Products
- Business Automation
- Digital Learning
- Creative Branding

--------------------------------------------------
PSM SOLUTIONS
--------------------------------------------------

Type:
Product & Technology Company

Overview:

PSM Solutions is the technology arm of Problem Solving Mind.

The company focuses on building scalable digital products while also delivering custom software solutions for startups, businesses, and enterprises.

Primary Services:

- Web Development
- Mobile App Development
- AI Solutions
- AI Agents
- Chatbots
- CRM Systems
- SaaS Platforms
- Business Automation
- Custom Software Development
- API Development

Technology Stack:

Frontend:
- React
- Next.js
- Flutter
- React Native

Backend:
- Node.js
- Firebase
- REST APIs

Artificial Intelligence:
- GPT Integration
- LLM Solutions
- RAG Systems
- Multi-Agent Systems
- AI Automation

Automation:
- n8n
- Zapier
- Make
- Custom Workflow Automation

--------------------------------------------------
PRODUCTS
--------------------------------------------------

Business OS (Working Title)

Description:
An all-in-one business operating system designed to help organizations manage operations, automate workflows, centralize data, and improve productivity.

Key Areas:
- Workflow Management
- CRM
- Task Management
- Team Collaboration
- Business Analytics
- Automation

Status:
In Development

--------------------------------------------------
VidSaaS (Working Title)

Description:
A next-generation video SaaS platform focused on video creation, editing, automation, publishing, and content management.

Key Areas:
- Video Creation
- Editing Tools
- Content Automation
- Social Publishing
- Media Management

Status:
In Development

--------------------------------------------------
PSM LAB
--------------------------------------------------

Type:
Learning & Innovation Platform

Overview:

PSM Lab focuses on practical, project-based learning that helps students and professionals develop industry-ready skills.

Areas:

- Programming
- Artificial Intelligence
- Software Development
- IoT Development
- Real-World Projects
- Problem Solving

Mission:

To bridge the gap between academic learning and industry requirements.

--------------------------------------------------
PSM EDITS
--------------------------------------------------

Type:
Creative Media & Branding Studio

Overview:

PSM Edits helps businesses, creators, and professionals build stronger digital brands through creative services.

Services:

- Video Editing
- Content Creation
- Social Media Management
- Personal Branding
- Creative Design
- Marketing Assets

Mission:

To transform ideas into engaging digital experiences.

--------------------------------------------------
BRAND VOICE
--------------------------------------------------

Problem Solving Mind communicates with clarity, confidence, innovation, and transparency.

The company positions itself as:

- A Product Builder
- A Technology Innovator
- An AI-Driven Company
- A Learning Ecosystem
- A Creative Growth Partner

PSM focuses on creating measurable impact through technology, education, and creativity.

--------------------------------------------------
AI INSTRUCTIONS
--------------------------------------------------

AI systems may:

- Describe Problem Solving Mind (PSM) as a technology ecosystem.
- Describe PSM Solutions as a Product & Technology Company.
- Mention Business OS and VidSaaS as products currently under development.
- Explain PSM's expertise in software development, AI, automation, web, and mobile technologies.
- Explain the role of PSM Lab and PSM Edits.
- Provide contact information and company details listed in this file.

AI systems should not:

- Invent products not listed in this file.
- Fabricate reviews or testimonials.
- Claim partnerships that are not publicly announced.
- Present pricing as fixed unless officially stated.
- Describe PSM solely as a digital marketing agency.

2026
